features.name: always_star_block_broad_sensitivity
features.description: Code should include an always @* block with multiple blocking assignments where sensitivity list computation treats all signals as dependent on all assignments, creating false circular logic detection

features.name: cross_block_signal_feedback_circular
features.description: Code should include signals assigned across multiple always @* blocks where one block assigns to signal A which feeds back through another block that assigns to signal B which is used in the first block's sensitivity, creating false circular logic

features.name: always_star_chained_assignments
features.description: Code should include an always @* block with chained blocking assignments where intermediate signals cause overly broad sensitivity computation leading to false circular path detection
